ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "parcel_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* The street address of the property */,
  "appraised_value" TEXT /* The appraised market value of the property */,
  "num_stories" INTEGER /* Number of stories in the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "num_full_baths" INTEGER /* Number of full bathrooms in the property */,
  "num_half_baths" INTEGER /* Number of half bathrooms in the property */,
  "living_area" INTEGER /* Total living area of the property in square feet */,
  "basement" TEXT /* Indicates if the property has a basement */,
  "basement_area" INTEGER /* Area of the basement in square feet */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (residential, commercial, etc.) */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Status of the property (active, sold, etc.) */,
  "land_area" TEXT /* Land area of the property in square feet */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the property (region, city, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the property was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the property was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the property was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parcel_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., assessor, manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "parcel_number" TEXT /* Reference to the property being assessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "new_appraised_value" TEXT /* New appraised value determined during the assessment */,
  "assessment_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the assessment */,
  "assessment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assessment (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assessment was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assessment was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_parcel_number FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_number") REFERENCES properties ("parcel_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "parcel_number" TEXT /* Reference to the property */,
  "appraised_value" TEXT /* Appraised value at the time of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the appraised value was recorded */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history record was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history record was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_parcel_number FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_number") REFERENCES properties ("parcel_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing properties and assessments */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., assessment, report) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log record was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log record was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "parcel_number" TEXT /* Reference to the property being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the inspection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inspection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inspection was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inspection was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_parcel_number FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_number") REFERENCES properties ("parcel_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspection_types" (
  "inspection_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection type */,
  "inspection_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspection type */,
  "inspection_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the inspection type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inspection type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inspection type was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inspection type was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_type_id")
)
